# @agentix-e/entity-resolver

> Entity Resolution engine for TypeScript. Stateless pure-computation core with WASM acceleration.

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { dedupe } from '@agentix-e/entity-resolver-core';
const result = await dedupe(records);
// result.clusters, result.scores, result.diagnostics
```

## Architecture

- **Core**: Stateless engine `f(records) → {clusters, scores, diagnostics}`. Zero I/O, runs anywhere JS runs.
- **Node**: FileDataSource, SqliteEntityStore, FileConfigStore
- **Browser**: FetchDataSource, IndexedDBEntityStore, LocalStorageConfigStore
- **Server**: Hono REST + MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 + SSE transport
- **CLI**: dedupe, match, link, gazetteer, benchmark, autoconfigure
- **Visual**: 3-layer (Data API + Headless + Web Components)

## Key Features

- **Fellegi-Sunter probabilistic model** with EM estimation, match weights, TF adjustments
- **5 blocking strategies**: Standard, Token, Sorted Neighborhood, Multi-pass, Meta-blocking
- **19 scorers** with WASM acceleration (~5x faster)
- **12 clustering algorithms**: Connected Components, DBSCAN, Unique Mapping, Center, BestMatch, MergeCenter, Correlation, Cut, Markov, KiralyMSM, RicochetSR, RowColumn
- **3 blocking builders**: SuffixArrays, ExtendedSuffixArrays, ExtendedQGrams
- **7 weighting schemes**: CBS, JACCARD, COSINE, DICE, ECBS, EJS, X²
- **8 pruning methods**: WEP, CEP, CNP, RCNP, WNP, BLAST, RWNP, CP
- **Streaming**: IDataSource interface with AsyncIterable
- **Privacy**: PPRL Bloom filter encoding
- **LLM scorer**: Optional DeepSeek/OpenAI boundary-pair resolution
- **Active learning**: Uncertainty sampling + logistic classifier
- **Golden record**: Field-level survivorship (most_popular, longest, source_priority)

## Interfaces

```typescript
interface IDataSource { read(): AsyncIterable<Record<string, unknown>> }
interface IEntityStore { getEntity, queryNeighbors, upsertEntity, applyMerge, applySplit }
interface IConfigStore { load, save, list }
interface IScorer { readonly name; score(a, b, field): number }
interface ILogger { debug, info, warn, error }
```

## Error Hierarchy

14 typed error classes: ValidationError, ConfigurationError, IOError, ParseError, ResolutionError, BlockingError, ScoringError, ClusteringError, EvaluationError, ConvergenceError, LLMError, AuthError, RateLimitError, InternalError

## Repository

- **URL**: https://github.com/AgentiX-E/entity-resolver
- **License**: MIT
- **Package manager**: pnpm 9.15.0
- **Node**: >= 22.0.0
- **CI**: Ubuntu + Windows + macOS, Node 20 + 22, 95% coverage thresholds
- **Author**: Lambertyan — AgentiX-E
